title: ggen-dspy real streaming predictor
changes: Replaced single-chunk stub in `StreamingA2aPredictor::forward_stream` with real `genai` streaming call via `client.exec_chat_stream()`
Stream iterates `ChatStreamEvent::Chunk` and `ChatStreamEvent::ReasoningChunk` events, yielding each as `StreamingChunk { content: delta, is_final: false }`
Final sentinel `StreamingChunk { content: "", is_final: true, usage: Some(final_usage) }` is emitted after all events
Events are collected into a Vec while holding the Mutex lock, then the lock is released before the returned stream is constructed

Added unit test `test_mock_llm_client_emits_multiple_chunks` using synthetic `ChatStreamEvent` vector to verify: (a) at least two chunks emitted, (b) intermediate chunks have is_final=false, (c) final chunk has is_final=true with usage

test_results.cargo_make_check: Finished dev profile ŌĆö no errors
